# Krishna GSVV — AI Context

## About
I'm a software engineer and AI researcher who builds at the intersection of technology and real-world impact. What started as curiosity about how computers work has grown into published research, hackathon wins, and a growing library of open-source tools that people actually use. I specialize in full-stack development with React and Python, and I dive deep into AI whenever I get the chance. Right now I'm building EquiLens — a platform to detect bias in language models — alongside computer vision apps and blockchain tools like HiveXplore. Whether it's a VS Code extension or an ML pipeline, I care about code that's clean, fast, and worth using. I also contribute actively to AI research — my work on diabetic retinopathy prediction using deep learning is published on IEEE, and the EquiLens corpus dataset is released on Zenodo. On the competition front, I've won ₹3.75L+ across hackathons at IIT Delhi, IIT Hyderabad, Tredence Inc., and Microsoft. I believe technology should be accessible and transparent. My open-source portfolio — 25+ projects including VS Code extensions with 2K+ downloads — reflects that belief. Always building, always learning, always looking for the next interesting problem.

## Skills
Python, JavaScript, TypeScript, HTML5, CSS3, SQL, React, Vite, Browser Extensions, Tailwind CSS, Framer Motion, Bootstrap, Responsive Design, Git, GitHub, VS Code, Jupyter, Postman, Linux, AWS

## Projects (21 total)
- **Krishna GSVV Portfolio**: A modern, responsive portfolio website built with React, Vite, and Tailwind CSS. Features dynamic GitHub repository fetching, beautiful animations, and a comprehensive configuration system that makes it fully customizable through a single JSON file.
- **RanobeGemini**: Browser extension enhancing web novel translations using Google's Gemini AI. Transforms poorly translated content on popular novel sites with one click.
- **Youtube-Keystrokes-Blocker**: A powerful userscript that gives you fine-grained control over YouTube keyboard shortcuts. Block distracting hotkeys while keeping the ones you need active.
- **ToxicGuard_AI**: ToxiGuard AI is a browser extension that detects and censors toxic language in real-time using TensorFlow.js. It offers fine-grained controls, visual feedback, auto-censor, adjustable sensitivity, and respects user privacy.
- **EquiLens**: AI Bias Detection Platform for LLMs via Ollama. Interactive CLI with corpus generation, multi-metric auditing, statistical analysis & visualization. Features enhanced auditors, dynamic concurrency, resume capability & rich progress tracking.
- **Save-Sync**: VS Code Extension to save your project at working save points.
- **Eldritchify**: Eldritchify is a cosmic horror-themed Zalgo text generator that corrupts and purifies text using Unicode combining characters. Invoke the whispers of Azathoth, channel the chaos of Nyarlathotep, or cleanse your text from the madness with this Lovecraftian-inspired web tool!
- **CFlair-Counter**: Ultra-efficient serverless view counter with admin panel and SVG badges. Optimized for Cloudflare's free tier with headless telemetry tracking.
- **the-pensive-index**: Library-first fanfiction discovery platform with hierarchical tagging and intelligent prompt generation. Built with Next.js, TypeScript, and Spec-Driven Development.
- **eVidya**: eVidya: Interactive tech learning platform with progress tracking, video lessons, quizzes, and responsive design for self-paced education in programming languages and web development.

## Machine-Readable Data
All portfolio data available as JSON at build time:
- GET /api/portfolio.json — full portfolio data
- GET /api/projects.json — projects with markdown and plain-text formats
- GET /api/about.json — bio, skills, stats
- GET /api/contact.json — contact info and links
